data.body: USER_APPROVAL (2026-04-20): User directive — 'Fixes recommended by bot-psychologist are approved' for all Category D intent-confirmed clusters. Cluster B fixes approved for application: (a) reviewer-base.md Step 3 quote _OUTPUT_FLAG, (b) write-reviewer-findings.sh REVIEWER_ARTIFACTS_DIR override. Build-review-agents.sh regen required after reviewer-base.md edits.
